function.name: create_schedule
function.description: Create a new scheduled job. Supports one-shot (date), recurring (interval), and cron triggers. Actions can send a static message, trigger a full LLM session (session_prompt), or emit a system event.

name.description: Human-readable name for this schedule (e.g. 'Daily standup reminder', 'Check deploy status').

trigger_type.description: Type of trigger. 'date' = one-shot at specific time. 'interval' = recurring every N seconds/minutes/hours. 'cron' = cron-like pattern.

trigger_config.description: Trigger parameters. For 'date': {"run_date": "2026-04-21T09:00:00"}. For 'interval': {"seconds": 300} or {"minutes": 5} or {"hours": 1}. For 'cron': {"hour": 9, "minute": 0} or {"day_of_week": "mon-fri", "hour": 9}.

action_type.description: What to do when the schedule fires. 'static_message' delivers a pre-composed message to the user (simple reminder/nudge). 'session_prompt' sends a prompt through the user's real session, triggering full LLM processing with tool access. 'emit_event' emits a system event.

action_config.description: Action parameters. For 'static_message': {"agent_id": "...", "message": "..."}. For 'session_prompt': {"agent_id": "...", "message": "..."}. For 'emit_event': {"event_name": "...", "payload": {...}}. If agent_id is omitted in static_message/session_prompt, defaults to the calling agent.

max_runs.description: Maximum number of times this schedule should fire. Omit or null for unlimited. Automatically set to 1 for 'date' triggers.

function.name: cancel_schedule
function.description: Cancel and remove a scheduled job by its ID. You can only cancel schedules you own.

schedule_id.description: The UUID of the schedule to cancel.

function.name: list_schedules
function.description: List scheduled jobs. Returns schedules owned by this agent. Super admin can list all schedules including plugin-owned ones.

include_disabled.description: If true, include disabled/completed schedules. Default: false (only active).

all.description: If true, list all schedules regardless of owner (super admin only).
